parts.text: 构建vscode插件，我要本地安装vsix测试

用户想要构建 VSCode 插件并本地安装 VSIX 进行测试。我需要先了解项目结构，看看是否已经有 VSCode 扩展相关的代码，然后帮助用户构建和安装。

让我先探索一下项目结构。

339:           "description": "AgentLog 本地后台服务地址。修改后需重启插件生效。",
340:           "order": 1
341:         },
342:         "agentlog.mcp.configuredClients": {
343:           "type": "array",
344:           "default": [],
345:           "items": {
346:             "type": "string"
347:           },
348:           "markdownDescription": "已完成 MCP 配置的 AI 客户端列表（由插件自动维护，请勿手动编辑）。",
349:           "order": 3
350:         },
351:         "agentlog.autoBindOnCommit": {
352:           "type": "boolean",
353:           "default": true,
354:           "description": "在执行 git commit 时，自动将最近的未绑定 AI 会话与该 Commit 关联。",
355:           "order": 4
356:         },
357:         "agentlog.retentionDays": {
358:           "type": "number",
359:           "default": 90,
360:           "minimum": 0,
361:           "description": "会话记录保留天数。设为 0 表示永久保留。",
362:           "order": 5
363:         },
364:         "agentlog.autoStartBackend": {
365:           "type": "boolean",
366:           "default": true,
367:           "description": "VS Code 启动时，是否自动在后台启动 AgentLog 本地服务。",
368:           "order": 6
369:         },
370:         "agentlog.debug": {
371:           "type": "boolean",
372:           "default": false,
373:           "description": "启用调试日志输出（输出到「输出」面板的 AgentLog 频道）。",
374:           "order": 7
375:         },
376:         "agentlog.exportLanguage": {
377:           "type": "string",
378:           "default": "zh",
379:           "enum": [
380:             "zh",
381:             "en"
382:           ],
383:           "enumDescriptions": [
384:             "中文",
385:             "English"
386:           ],
387:           "description": "导出周报 / PR 描述时使用的语言。",
388:           "order": 8
389:         }
390:       }
391:     },
392:     "statusBar": []
393:   },
394:   "scripts": {
395:     "postinstall": "node scripts/check-node-version.js",
396:     "compile": "node build.mjs",
397:     "watch": "node build.mjs --watch",
398:     "copy-webview": "node -e \"const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src='src/webview';const dst='dist/webview';if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f)));\"",
399:     "copy-backend": "node -e \"const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src='../backend/dist';const dst='dist/backend';if(!fs.existsSync(dst))fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});function copyDir(src,dst){const entries=fs.readdirSync(src,{withFileTypes:true});entries.forEach(entry=>{const srcPath=p.join(src,entry.name);const dstPath=p.join(dst,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory()){if(!fs.existsSync(dstPath))fs.mkdirSync(dstPath,{recursive:true});copyDir(srcPath,dstPath);}else{fs.copyFileSync(srcPath,dstPath);}});}copyDir(src,dst);\"",
400:     "build": "node build.mjs",
401:     "vscode:prepublish": "node build.mjs",
402:     "package": "vsce package --no-dependencies",
403:     "lint": "tsc --noEmit",
404:     "clean": "rm -rf dist",
405:     "test:fetch": "node --import tsx --test test/fetchInterception.test.ts"
406:   },
407:   "dependencies": {
408:     "@agentlog/shared": "workspace:*",
409:     "playwright": "^1.59.1"
410:   },
411:   "devDependencies": {
412:     "@types/chai": "^5.2.3",
413:     "@types/mocha": "^10.0.10",
414:     "@types/node": "^20.11.30",
415:     "@types/vscode": "^1.85.0",
416:     "@vscode/test-electron": "^2.5.2",
417:     "@vscode/vsce": "^2.24.0",
418:     "chai": "^6.2.2",
419:     "esbuild": "^0.27.4",
420:     "mocha": "^11.7.5",
421:     "tsx": "^4.7.2",
422:     "typescript": "^5.4.5"
423:   }
424: }

(End of file - total 424 lines)
</content>

  "name": "agentlog-vscode",
  "displayName": "AgentLog — AI 编程飞行记录仪",
  "description": "AI 编程助手必备！自动捕获 DeepSeek/Cursor/Cline 等 AI Agent 交互日志（Prompt/Reasoning/Response），与 Git Commit 智能绑定，支持一键导出周报、PR 说明、提交上下文。兼容 DeepSeek、Qwen、Kimi 等国产大模型，让 AI 编程过程全程可追溯。",

state.title: packages/vscode-extension/package.json

parts.text:
项目已经有一个 vscode-extension 包，并且已经有一些 .vsix 文件了。用户想要构建并本地安装测试。

我需要：
1. 先构建扩展（compile 或 build）
2. 然后打包成 VSIX
3. 最后安装

根据 package.json，构建命令是 `pnpm build` 或 `pnpm compile`，打包是 `pnpm package`。

让我先执行构建和打包命令。

state.title: Package extension to VSIX

parts.text:
VSIX 文件已生成：`agentlog-vscode-1.0.1.vsix`

现在用户可以通过 VS Code 安装这个 VSIX 文件。安装方法：
1. 在 VS Code 中按 `Cmd+Shift+P`
2. 输入 "Extensions: Install from VSIX..."
3. 选择这个文件

或者用命令行：
```bash
code --install-extension agentlog-vscode-1.0.1.vsix
```

VSIX 已生成：`agentlog-vscode-1.0.1.vsix`

安装方式：
- **VS Code**: `Cmd+Shift+P` → "Extensions: Install from VSIX..."
- **命令行**: `code --install-extension agentlog-vscode-1.0.1.vsix`
